data.name: Whispers of Desire
data.detailed_description:
Experience The Story

Follow the story of Sarah and Alex, a happily married couple embarking on a new chapter of their lives. As they settle into fresh opportunities and social circles, unexpected desires and challenges arise, testing the strength of their bond. Whispers of Desire lets you experience the story from both Sarah and Alex’s perspectives, giving you a deeper look into their thoughts, emotions, and choices as they navigate their relationship and the challenges ahead. With rich storytelling, immersive character interactions, and meaningful choices, the game invites players to shape Sarah and Alex’s paths—exploring the intricacies of relationships, trust, and desire.

What begins as admiration and opportunity slowly evolves into something deeper and more dangerous.

Photoshoots. Therapy sessions. Massages. Private conversations. Lingering glances.

Every moment builds tension.
Every choice shapes the outcome.

Explore the paths

You step into a relationship tested by desire, temptation, trust, and outside influence. As the story unfolds, your decisions quietly shape its direction, opening one of four intertwined routes. Together, they will navigate a journey that pushes boundaries, tests loyalties, and reveals desires they never thought they'd share.

Four routes. One story. Where it leads depends entirely on you.

  • Loyalty: Stronger Together

    Temptation is real, but so is commitment. You face desire with honesty and restraint, deepening the bond instead of breaking it.

  • Open Relationship: New Rules, New Desires

    Together, you choose exploration. Boundaries are discussed, trust is tested, and intimacy takes new and unexpected forms.

  • Betrayal: Secrets and Scars

    Desire slips into secrecy. Hidden choices and quiet lies begin to erode what once felt secure

  • Seduction: Crossing Lines

    A third presence pulls at vulnerability and attraction, slowly shifting control and challenging the relationship’s foundation.

🎭 FEATURES

  • Branching storyline shaped by meaningful player choices

  • Relationship system influenced by jealousy, dominance, trust, and curiosity

  • Multiple paths including emotional loyalty, open dynamics, and darker psychological routes

  • Premium rendered visuals

  • High-quality animated scenes with voice acting

  • Dynamic point tracking system influencing character behavior and unlockable paths

  • Optional content paths (you choose how far the story goes)

  • Mature themes explored through character-driven storytelling

data.short_description: Choice-driven visual novel with dual perspectives. Follow a happily married couple starting a new chapter filled with fresh opportunities and new social circles. Unexpected desires and emotional challenges test the strength of their bond as their choices shape trust, love, and their future together.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 簡體中文, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® 7/8/8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.15 or better
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
